refresh_rule: Weekly release Wednesday 10:30 ET; stocks include crude and petroleum products and are reconciled later in PSM/PSA

title: Petroleum Supply Monthly stocks

refresh_rule: Thursday 10:30 ET; survey based; about 95 percent coverage of working storage capacity

title: Monthly Oil Statistics
refresh_rule: Monthly OECD stocks and balances; free product
notes: Primary public OECD stock series.

title: Oil Stocks of IEA Countries
refresh_rule: Updated each month with the Oil Market Report; reserve adequacy indicator

title: Monthly Oil Data Service stocks
refresh_rule: Comprehensive industry and government controlled stocks; not public without access
notes: Use when licensed access is available.

title: JODI Oil World Database stocks
refresh_rule: Monthly M-1 updates; stock levels vary by country; China stock levels are not available
notes: Best cross-country public oil stock and stock-change source.

title: JODI Gas World Database stocks
unit: million m3 TJ and 1000 tons LNG
refresh_rule: Monthly M-1 updates around the 20th; includes closing stocks and LNG trade; gas stocks exclude cushion gas and line pack
notes: Best cross-country public gas stock source.

title: GIE AGSI and ALSI transparency platforms
geography: Europe and EU27 storage and LNG terminals
refresh_rule: Daily previous-gas-day storage and LNG reporting; API is free after registration
notes: Best public Europe gas storage and LNG inventory source.

refresh_rule: Daily monitoring of coal supply and thermal power plant stock reporting
notes: Best public coal stockpile source I found.
